intro: Tunica arenicola, also known as the sand-dune cactus, is a succulent plant native to the coastal regions of South Africa. The health benefits of Tunica arenicola include its anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in reducing pain and inflammation in the body, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, triterpenoids, and glycosides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Tunica arenicola is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and ointments to treat various health conditions, including wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues.
